sections.paragraph: Osama Bin Laden, (1957-2011) Saudi billionaire and founding leader of al-Qaeda (suspected of masterminding the terrorist bombings of two American embassies in Africa in 1998, and the crashing of hijacked planes into the Pentagon and the Twin Towers in the USA in 2001, causing thousands of deaths, and the destruction of the famous skyscrapers) killed in a raid by the United States special operation forces
